subscription.title: Subscription & HookPoints
subscription.checkout_web: On the web, you can upgrade directly via Stripe Checkout.
subscription.checkout_ios: In-app purchases on iOS are handled through the App Store.
subscription.checkout_android: In-app purchases on Android are handled through Google Play.

community.chat_warning: This message may contain contact info

hero.sub: The intelligent fishing app that understands your catches. AI-powered predictions, tide tracking and community — all in one app.

features.title: Everything you need to fish smarter
features.1_desc: Take a photo — the AI identifies the species, logs measurements and calculates your Strike Score automatically.
features.2_desc: Solunar phases, tide calendars, wind forecasts and barometric pressure trends for the perfect fishing moment.
features.3_desc: The app analyses your catches and recommends the optimal bait — based on season, water body and weather.
features.4_desc: Verified catches via GPS & photo. Transparent community rating — fair and tamper-proof.
features.5_desc: Fishing licences for 14 countries right in the app. Buy, store and show them — no paperwork needed.
features.6_desc: Crews, tournaments, live chat and professional fishing coaches for your next session.

how.label: How it works
how.title: Three steps to the perfect strike
how.1_desc: Take a photo, confirm the species, enter measurements. In under 60 seconds your catch is documented — including weather, GPS and bait.
how.2_desc: After each catch your personal skill profile is refined. The AI analyses patterns in your successes and failures.
how.3_desc: Personalised Strike Score forecasts: when does which fish bite, at which spot, with which bait? StrikeAhead knows.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What anglers say
testimonials.1_text: Since I started using StrikeAhead, my catch rate has doubled. The AI predictions are uncannily accurate — my best pike came exactly in the window the app recommended.
testimonials.2_text: The licence manager alone is worth the subscription. I fish in 5 different countries and finally have all my permits in one place. Plus the community — highly recommended!
testimonials.3_text: The Trust Score has made tournaments fairer. No more fake catches — everyone can see instantly if a catch is GPS-verified. Finally an app that takes sport anglers seriously.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Find your plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade anytime. Cancel monthly.

devices.label: Platform
devices.title: Always with you — on every device
devices.subtitle: One app, three platforms. Your catches are always in sync — whether you're at the lake or at your desk.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes! The Free plan is free forever. You can log up to 10 catches per month, use AI species recognition and read the community feed. Upgrade anytime, cancel monthly.
faq.q2: Which platforms is the app available on?
faq.a2: StrikeAhead runs as a web app in any browser (desktop & mobile), as a native iOS app on the App Store and as an Android app on Google Play. All platforms are fully synchronised.
faq.q3: How accurate are the AI catch predictions?
faq.a3: Prediction accuracy improves with every logged catch. Our model combines your personal catch history with weather data, solunar phases, tide calendars and community data. After about 20 catches, predictions are significantly personalised.
faq.q4: Which countries does the Licence Manager support?
faq.a4: Currently Germany, Austria, Switzerland, Netherlands, Belgium, France, Spain, Portugal, Italy, Croatia, Poland, Denmark, Sweden and Norway. More countries are being added.
faq.q5: Are my GPS data and fishing spots shared?
faq.a5: Never without your permission. Every catch is private by default. You decide what to share with the community. GPS coordinates are encrypted and never passed to third parties.
faq.q6: Can I use StrikeAhead as a fishing coach?
faq.a6: Yes! With the Legend plan you can create your coaching profile, take on students, manage bookings and even host your own tournaments.

final_cta.title: Your next catch is waiting.
final_cta.sub: Get started now — on iOS, Android or right in your browser. No credit card needed for the Free plan.
